{{Infobox group
| name = Ghost Division
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Ghost Division]] is one of the [[Abidan]] divisions.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Ghost Division]] is a division of the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Ghost Division]] builds and maintains the laws of reality.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] mentioned the [[Ghost Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
